title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Vedanta Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Vedanta Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Vedanta Capital India in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vedanta Capital India:
Vedanta Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
